case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JOSE ISMAEL CHICAS CHICAS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $660.93 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CHICAS, JOSE ISMAEL  CHICAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSSE ISMAEL CHICAS CHICAS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHICAS, JOSE ISMAEL  CHICAS $660.93 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $740.93 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CHICAS, JOSE ISMAEL  CHICAS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JUL-17-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHICAS, JOSE ISMAEL  CHICAS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CHICAS, JOSE ISMAEL  CHICAS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
